title: Large platform vendor presents a hyperbolic agent runtime with shared memory data plane
summary: The architecture combines hyperbolic planning, agent graphs, zero-copy shared memory, Arrow-based exchange, mesh orchestration and a planner driven workflow runtime.

title: Research note on zero-copy orchestration and resonance-aware tool graphs
summary: The team describes zero-copy pipelines, resonance invariants, distributed workers, tool graphs, reviewers and scheduler driven execution in a single runtime.

title: Enterprise cluster stack adds planner, reviewer swarm and Poincare inspired embeddings
summary: The release mentions Poincare geometry, planner agents, reviewer workflows, shared memory, Arrow transport, mesh execution and runtime level orchestration.
